name: Chatsworth International School
tagline: Boutique IB World School with two intimate campuses
description: Chatsworth International School is a boutique IB World School with campuses in Orchard and Bukit Timah. Offering the full IB continuum (PYP, MYP, DP), Chatsworth is known for small class sizes, personalised attention, and a warm, community-oriented atmosphere. With approximately 750 students across both campuses, it provides an intimate alternative to larger international schools.

admission.process: Applications accepted year-round. Students assessed for English proficiency and academic readiness.

faqs.question: How big is Chatsworth?
faqs.answer: Chatsworth has about 750 students across two campuses, with average class sizes of 16 students. This allows for personalised attention and a close-knit community.
